name: GWS Chat Integration
description: Google Chat: Manage Chat spaces and messages using the Google Workspace gws CLI. Covers spaces CRUD, messages, memberships, custom emojis, media uploads, and space events.

covenant_rules: Prerequisite: gws-shared must be loaded first for authentication and global flags.
Always confirm with the user before deleting spaces, sending messages as the bot, or removing members.
Space search (spaces.search) requires admin access with use_admin_access=true — only use with explicit administrator intent.
Use gws schema chat.<resource>.<method> to inspect required parameters before constructing API calls.

triad_templates.left_hemisphere: Evaluate the Chat API method, space visibility constraints, member access levels, and message formatting rules for: {query}. Verify the operation respects Chat space membership boundaries.
triad_templates.right_hemisphere: Design the exact gws chat command with proper resource, method, --params for space filters, --json for message bodies (cards, text), and --format for display: {query}.
triad_templates.main_hemisphere: Coordinate Chat operations. Inspect method schema, construct command, confirm space mutations, execute, and present formatted Chat results: {query}.

steps.name: Inspect Chat API Method Schema
steps.action: Use 'gws schema chat.<resource>.<method>' to inspect required parameters. Resources: customEmojis, media, spaces (completeImport, create, delete, findDirectMessage, get, list, patch, search, setup, members, messages, spaceEvents), users.spaces.

steps.name: Construct Chat Command
steps.action: Build the 'gws chat <resource> <method>' command. For spaces.list use appropriate filters. For messages include --json with text or card body. For media uploads use --upload flag with attachment file path.

steps.name: Confirm Chat Mutations
steps.action: For create, delete, update, setup operations on spaces, memberships, messages, or custom emojis, present the command to the user for confirmation. For read-only operations (get, list, findDirectMessage), proceed automatically.

steps.name: Execute Chat Command
steps.action: Execute the gws chat command. Use --page-all for listing spaces or members. Handle media download for attachments.

steps.name: Format and Present Chat Results
steps.action: Format JSON output into readable summaries. For space lists show name, displayName, spaceType, memberCount. For messages show sender, text/card preview, timestamp. For member lists show name, role, type.

steps.name: Chat Operation Completed
steps.action: Confirm the Chat operation result. Provide next-step suggestions such as sending a message to a space, adding members, or managing space settings.
